area.value: 30-ft.-radius spread centered on you 30-ft.-radius spread centered on you

description.value: You emit a pulsating mental blast that stuns all creatures in range of your psychic shriek for 1 round. Synaptic Pulse, Greater You emit a pulsating mental blast that stuns all creatures in range of your psychic shriek for 1d4 rounds. On a successful save, a creature is instead sickened for 1 round.
